title: mo.co
notes:
● Weapon Mastery is here! Every weapon now has its own progression path. Earn stars in Elite contracts with the weapon, clear Dojo Challenges, and hit other weapon Milestones to unlock rewards — including a Golden variant of the Weapon Skins, a unique title, and of course - mo.gold.
● Daily Goal Streaks! Hit your daily goals day af ter day to build a streak and unlock double rewards!
● Elite Hunter improvements — More clarity on what the track is and a cleaner screen for each time you upgrade yo
